label: Cinder Cantina Stores
description: Cinder Cantina Stores forms a narrow, slagcrete-walled chamber recessed behind the tavern’s ribbed vaulting, its ceiling crossed by soot-dark conduit and sealed service runs. Stacked plasteel crates and locking caskets line riveted shelving, all dusted in the fine ash that infiltrates even pressurized interiors. A single violet lumen-strip and emergency glow-panels throw hard reflections across oiled stone flags marked with drag-scrapes and tally stencils. Intake grilles and vox-baffle housings are set into the rear wall, maintaining the cantina’s muffled, airtight character against Ashenward City’s ash-gales.
